last_frame_analysis:
Frame 97
Setting/Scene:
The scene has transitioned from the outdoor plaza to a graphic title card. The background is a solid, light blue gradient.
- A large, central logo is displayed, featuring the word "LU DO" in stylized, rounded orange letters inside a white square with an orange border.
- The logo is surrounded by a colorful, cartoonish wreath of green leaves, purple flowers, and a pineapple at the top.
- In the bottom center, the text "Bluey" appears in white, accompanied by a small icon of the character Bluey. Below that, smaller text reads "BLUEY © LUDO STUDIO 2019".

Action/Movement:
- The character Bluey (the blue dog) is now positioned on the left side of the screen, standing on all fours.
- He is looking towards the center logo with a slightly confused or questioning expression, indicated by his wide eyes and raised eyebrows.
- There is no movement; this is a static title card frame.

New Information:
- The setting has completely changed from the live-action style plaza to a 2D animated graphic.
- The "LU DO" logo is the primary focus, indicating the name of the studio or production company.
- The copyright date "2019" is visible.

Continuity Points:
- This frame marks a clear break from the previous sequence (Frames 75-96) which took place in the plaza.
- The character Bluey, who was previously performing a handstand in the plaza, is now shown in a different pose (standing) and a different environment (graphic overlay).
- The transcript "This is confusing" aligns with Bluey's expression as he looks at the new logo, suggesting a transition or a moment of realization about the context of the video.

Key continuation points:
- Note the shift from a 3D-like environment to a 2D graphic style.
- Observe Bluey's change in pose from an acrobatic handstand to a standing, questioning stance.
- Watch for the next frame to see if the video returns to the plaza scene or continues with the graphic sequence.
